---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for SupremeAI
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what the feature is.

## 🎯 Which Component(s)?
- [ ] X-Builder (Code Generation)
- [ ] Y-Reviewer (Code Quality)
- [ ] Z-Architect (System Design)
- [ ] Phase 4 Monitoring (Metrics/Alerts)
- [ ] Phase 5 Analytics/ML
- [ ] Dashboard UI
- [ ] API Endpoints
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## ✍️ Use Case
Describe the use case for this feature:
- Why is this feature needed?
- What problem does it solve?
- Who would benefit from it?

## 💬 Proposed Solution
Describe how you think this feature should work.

## 🤔 Alternative Solutions
Describe alternative approaches you've considered.

## 📊 Implementation Details (if known)
- **Estimated Effort:** [ ] Small (< 1 hour) [ ] Medium (1-4 hours) [ ] Large (4+ hours)
- **Requires API Changes:** [ ] Yes [ ] No
- **Requires Database Changes:** [ ] Yes [ ] No
- **Related Phase:** [ ] Phase 5 [ ] Phase 6 [ ] Phase 7 [ ] Future

## 🔗 Related Issues
Link to related issues or discussions.

## 📚 References
Links to documentation, similar projects, or RFC documents.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Feature description is clear
- [ ] Use case is well defined
- [ ] Proposed solution is reasonable
- [ ] No conflicts with existing features

---

**Priority:**
- [ ] 🟢 Low (Nice to have)
- [ ] 🟡 Medium (Should have)
- [ ] 🔴 High (Must have)
